ddls:
CREATE TABLE "sales" (
  "sale_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sale */,
  "property_id" INTEGER /* ID of the property being sold */,
  "sale_date" TEXT /* Date of the sale */,
  "sale_price" INTEGER /* Price of the sale */,
  "sale_type" TEXT /* Type of sale */,
  "sale_condition" TEXT /* Condition of the sale */,
  "agent_id" INTEGER /* ID of the agent handling the sale */,
  "buyer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the buyer */,
  "financing_type" TEXT /* Type of financing used for the sale */,
  "sale_duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the sale process in days */,
  "sale_status" TEXT /* Current status of the sale */,
  "sale_notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments about the sale */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sale_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sales_buyer_id FOREIGN KEY ("buyer_id") REFERENCES buyers ("buyer_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sales_sale_type FOREIGN KEY ("sale_type") REFERENCES sale_conditions ("sale_condition_name"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sales_agent_id FOREIGN KEY ("agent_id") REFERENCES agents ("agent_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "agents" (
  "agent_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each agent */,
  "agent_name" TEXT /* Name of the agent */,
  "agent_email" TEXT /* Email address of the agent */,
  "agent_phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the agent */,
  "agent_license_number" TEXT /* License number of the agent */,
  "agent_office" TEXT /* Name of the agent's office or agency */,
  "agent_rating" INTEGER /* Rating of the agent based on customer feedback */,
  "agent_experience_years" INTEGER /* Number of years of experience the agent has */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("agent_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "buyers" (
  "buyer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each buyer */,
  "buyer_name" TEXT /* Name of the buyer */,
  "buyer_email" TEXT /* Email address of the buyer */,
  "buyer_phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the buyer */,
  "buyer_address" TEXT /* Address of the buyer */,
  "buyer_occupation" TEXT /* Occupation of the buyer */,
  "buyer_income" INTEGER /* Annual income of the buyer */,
  "buyer_credit_score" INTEGER /* Credit score of the buyer */,
  "buyer_purpose" TEXT /* Purpose of the purchase */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("buyer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "neighborhoods" (
  "neighborhood_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each neighborhood */,
  "neighborhood_name" TEXT /* Name of the neighborhood */,
  "neighborhood_description" TEXT /* Description of the neighborhood */,
  "average_property_value" INTEGER /* Average value of properties in the neighborhood */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Population of the neighborhood */,
  "crime_rate" REAL /* Crime rate in the neighborhood */,
  "amenities" TEXT /* List of amenities available in the neighborhood */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("neighborhood_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "school_districts" (
  "district_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each district */,
  "district_name" TEXT /* Name of the district */,
  "district_description" TEXT /* Description of the district */,
  "average_test_scores" INTEGER /* Average test scores of schools in the district */,
  "student_population" INTEGER /* Total student population in the district */,
  "teacher_student_ratio" REAL /* Teacher-to-student ratio in the district */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("district_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "property_types" (
  "type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each type */,
  "type_name" TEXT /* Name of the type */,
  "type_description" TEXT /* Description of the property type */,
  "average_size" INTEGER /* Average size of properties of this type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "exteriors" (
  "exterior_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each exterior feature */,
  "exterior_name" TEXT /* Name of the exterior feature */,
  "exterior_description" TEXT /* Description of the exterior feature */,
  "maintenance_requirements" TEXT /* Maintenance requirements for the exterior feature */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("exterior_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "foundation_types" (
  "foundation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each foundation type */,
  "foundation_name" TEXT /* Name of the foundation type */,
  "foundation_description" TEXT /* Description of the foundation type */,
  "durability" TEXT /* Durability rating of the foundation type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("foundation_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "roof_types" (
  "roof_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each roof type */,
  "roof_name" TEXT /* Name of the roof type */,
  "roof_description" TEXT /* Description of the roof type */,
  "expected_lifespan" INTEGER /* Expected lifespan of the roof type in years */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("roof_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "heating_types" (
  "heating_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each heating type */,
  "heating_name" TEXT /* Name of the heating type */,
  "heating_description" TEXT /* Description of the heating type */,
  "energy_efficiency" TEXT /* Energy efficiency rating of the heating type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("heating_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "electrical_systems" (
  "electrical_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each electrical system */,
  "electrical_name" TEXT /* Name of the electrical system */,
  "electrical_description" TEXT /* Description of the electrical system */,
  "safety_rating" TEXT /* Safety rating of the electrical system */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("electrical_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "functional_types" (
  "functional_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each functional type */,
  "functional_name" TEXT /* Name of the functional type */,
  "functional_description" TEXT /* Description of the functional type */,
  "common_issues" TEXT /* Common issues associated with this functional type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("functional_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "garage_types" (
  "garage_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each garage type */,
  "garage_name" TEXT /* Name of the garage type */,
  "garage_description" TEXT /* Description of the garage type */,
  "storage_capacity" INTEGER /* Storage capacity of the garage in square feet */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("garage_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sale_conditions" (
  "sale_condition_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sale condition */,
  "sale_condition_name" TEXT /* Name of the sale condition */,
  "sale_condition_description" TEXT /* Description of the sale condition */,
  "common_scenarios" TEXT /* Common scenarios associated with this sale condition */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sale_condition_id")
)
